name: Godox Virso M2 2.4GHz Wireless Microphone Dual Transmitter Mic Resmi
description: Capture audio from Sony cameras, smartphones, or other recording devices all day using the Virso S M2 2-Person Wireless Microphone System from Godox. The system includes two clip-on transmitters with built-in omnidirectional microphones and a dual-channel receiver with a Multi Interface shoe and its own built-in microphone

features.Key Features: For Vlogging, YouTube, and Journalism | For Shoots with Sony Camera or Phone | 2 x Transmitters with Built-In Mics | Dual-Channel Receiver with MI Shoe | Omnidirectional Lavalier Microphones | microSD Card Slots, Backup Recording | Built-In Rechargeable Batteries | 3.5mm TRS Outputs, USB-C Ports | 656' Transmission Distance
features.What’s In The Box: 2x Transmitter (Virso TX) | 1x Receiver (Virso RX) | 1x Charging Case (ML-C4) | 1x USB to Type-C Data CAble | 2x Furry Windscreen | 1x 3.5mm TRS-TRRS Audio Connect Cable | 1x 3.5mm TRS-TRS Audio Connect Cable | 2x Omnidirectional Lavalier Microphone (LMS-12B AX) | 1x Portable Rope
